title: AAIB Report: Fatal Accident Involving Discus B and Standard Cirrus at Hinton-in-the-Hedges

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has released a report detailing a fatal accident involving a Discus B aircraft, registration G-DJMD, and a Standard Cirrus aircraft, registration G-DCTB. The incident occurred on 25 May 2024 at Hinton-in-the-Hedges Airfield in Northamptonshire.

The findings from the AAIB report highlight the circumstances surrounding the tragic event, emphasizing the need for ongoing safety measures in general aviation. Scotland's rich aviation heritage underlines the importance of safety in all flight operations, particularly as communities across the Highlands and Islands rely on air connectivity.
